description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named ci that can be called from another workflow. The workflow runs a single job on an ubuntu-latest environment with a ubuntu:jammy container. In this job, check out the repository, then in the drake_bazel_download directory, run a bash script to optionally download a package tarball based on a workflow input, install Bazelisk, and finally run a script for building and testing with Bazel.
